messages.content: Movies with king in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%king%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Which genre has the most movies
SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Most voted movie per genre

SELECT g.`name`, m.`title`, MAX(m.`vote_count`) AS `max_votes` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` GROUP BY g.`name`, m.`title` ORDER BY `max_votes` DESC LIMIT 20;
Most recent movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Show title and release year together
SELECT CONCAT(m.`title`, ' (', YEAR(m.`release_date`), ')') AS `title_year`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with rating between 6 and 7
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_average` BETWEEN 6.0 AND 7.0 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top comedy movies in English

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Comedy' AND l.`english_name`='English' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best movies from the 1990s
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top Italian movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Italian' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Highest popularity movie released this year
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)=YEAR(CURDATE()) ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 1;
Top 10 highest rated movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Most popular English movies released in 2022

SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='English' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)=2022 ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best movies from the 2000s
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movie with most votes
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`vote_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Minimum and maximum popularity per genre

SELECT g.`name`, MIN(m.`popularity`) AS `min_popularity`, MAX(m.`popularity`) AS `max_popularity` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `max_popularity` DESC;
Movies released in the last year
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 50;
Show genres for Toy Story

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Toy Story%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`;
Movies released in the last week
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Genres with more than 500 movies

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING `movie_count` > 500 ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC;
Movies released in March
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE MONTH(m.`release_date`) = 3 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Years with 50 or more movie releases
SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `year` HAVING `movie_count` >= 50 ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC;
Format release dates as Month Day Year for 2023 movies

SELECT m.`title`, DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%M %d, %Y') AS `formatted_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2023 AND m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`release_date` LIMIT 50;
Non-adult movies released in the last year
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`adult` = 0 AND m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Languages where average rating is below 5

SELECT l.`english_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` GROUP BY l.`english_name` HAVING AVG(m.`vote_average`) < 5 ORDER BY `avg_rating`;
Show genres for Titanic

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Titanic%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`;
Top 5 genres by total vote count

SELECT g.`name`, SUM(m.`vote_count`) AS `total_votes` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` ORDER BY `total_votes` DESC LIMIT 5;
Movies released in the last 45 days
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 45 DAY) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Which year had the most movie releases?
SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `year` ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Average vote average by release year since 2010

SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) >= 2010 AND m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `year` ORDER BY `year` DESC;
Show genres for Spider-Man movies

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Spider-Man%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title` ORDER BY m.`release_date`;
Monthly release count for 2021

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%M') AS `month_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2021 AND m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MONTH(m.`release_date`), DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%M') ORDER BY MONTH(m.`release_date`);
How many adult vs non-adult movies are there?
SELECT m.`adult`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m GROUP BY m.`adult`;
Movies with original title in a non-English language

SELECT m.`title`, m.`original_title`, l.`english_name` AS `original_language` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` != 'English' AND m.`original_title` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Genres with more than 100 movies released after 2010

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) > 2010 GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING `movie_count` > 100 ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC;
Top 10 movies released in the last 5 years by popularity
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies released in October
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE MONTH(m.`release_date`) = 10 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Format all 2024 movie release dates as YYYY/MM/DD

SELECT m.`title`, DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%Y/%m/%d') AS `formatted_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2024 AND m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`release_date` LIMIT 50;
Languages with more than 10 movies sorted by average popularity

SELECT l.`english_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count`, ROUND(AVG(m.`popularity`), 2) AS `avg_popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` GROUP BY l.`english_name` HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY `avg_popularity` DESC;
Genres where total popularity exceeds 10000

SELECT g.`name`, SUM(m.`popularity`) AS `total_popularity` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING `total_popularity` > 10000 ORDER BY `total_popularity` DESC;
Action movies released this year

SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE g.`name` = 'Action' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`) = YEAR(CURDATE()) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Romance movies with more than 5000 votes

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_count`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE g.`name` = 'Romance' AND m.`vote_count` > 5000 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Show the highest rated movie with its genres

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`, m.`vote_average` ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 1;
Which genres have an average vote count above 1000?

SELECT g.`name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_count`), 0) AS `avg_votes` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING AVG(m.`vote_count`) > 1000 ORDER BY `avg_votes` DESC;
Movie release counts per genre per year since 2020

SELECT g.`name`, YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 YEAR) GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name`, `year` ORDER BY `year` DESC, `movie_count` DESC;
Non-adult thriller movies released in the last 3 years

SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE g.`name` = 'Thriller' AND m.`adult` = 0 AND m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Compare Japanese vs Chinese ratings by genre

SELECT g.`name` AS `genre`, l.`english_name` AS `language`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Japanese', 'Chinese') GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name`, l.`english_name` ORDER BY g.`name`, l.`english_name`;
